scope: Headless GUT shutdown after all project tests. Raw counts include Godot-held global script classes; they may only be recalibrated after an audited pinned GF vendor-tree or project runtime class-set change, and must not grow while both inputs remain unchanged.
calibration_reason: The audited player board-editor phase adds seven project runtime class_name scripts, changing the project runtime class count from 135 to 142. The complete 225-test suite now instantiates the first runtime ItemList used by a player-facing scene; Godot 4.7's Dummy Renderer retains two additional default-control TextureStorage RIDs without increasing resources in use. With the same pinned GF 8.1.0 vendor tree, the reviewed exit counts are ObjectDB=288 and Resources=128, while ShapedText=2 and Font=3 remain unchanged.
